name: Australian Finance Group Ltd
analysis: AFG has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 38% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.7270, stop A$1.4504, target A$1.9000 (0.63:1) — then trail it.
